<!--
Issues are currently disabled on this repository. When re-enabled, this template
applies. Until then, please email the maintainer per SECURITY.md.

This template is for FACTUAL corrections to a single field in an existing
ruling entry — wrong panel composition, wrong vote count, wrong date, wrong
official URL, etc. For methodology disputes, see METHODOLOGY §7-§9.
-->

## Which entry has the error?

- Case ID: <!-- e.g. בג"ץ 5658/23 -->
- File: <!-- e.g. data/rulings/5658-23.json -->
- Field with error: <!-- e.g. panel[3].name_en -->

## What does the entry currently say?

<!-- Quote the current value exactly -->

## What should it say, and why?

<!-- The proposed corrected value -->

## Source supporting your correction

<!-- Link to the official ruling, court site, or other authoritative source.
Required per METHODOLOGY §5. -->

- [ ] I have read the METHODOLOGY document
- [ ] My correction is based on at least one source linked above
- [ ] I am not proposing editorial language or commentary
